'''Hpaq''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vulpter/Legends|Vulpter]] that was home to [[Viper Tower]], headquarters of [[Viper Sensor Intelligence Systems]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hpaq was originally created for ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]]'', a [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] article written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] with illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]] and released on [[April 4]], [[2002]].<ref name="Sensor Technology Dispute Settled in Takeover" />
